pull.title: [Refactor] Pass PP start_layer via model constructor instead of forward_batch.token_to_kv_pool
pull.body:
## Motivation

Several model attention layers check whether the current layer is the first layer on this PP rank using \`forward_batch.token_to_kv_pool.start_layer\`. This is static per-process configuration (determined by \`make_layers()\` at model init time) that does not change between forward passes and has no business being accessed via \`ForwardBatch\` at all.

## Modifications

For each affected model (llama, qwen3, qwen2, glm4_moe, qwen3_moe, qwen2_moe):
- Add \`start_layer: int = 0\` parameter to the attention layer \`__init__\`
- Set \`self.start_layer = start_layer\` in the attention layer \`__init__\`
- Thread \`start_layer\` from model → decoder layer → attention layer at construction time (using existing \`self.start_layer\` already computed by \`make_layers()\`)
- Change \`forward\` to read \`self.start_layer\` instead of \`forward_batch.token_to_kv_pool.start_layer\`

Also fixes positional-argument breakage in EAGLE subclass constructors (`llama_eagle.py`, `llama_eagle3.py`, `qwen2_eagle.py`) that called `super().__init__` with positional args and silently mis-routed `quant_config` → `start_layer` after the new parameter was inserted.

No runtime behavior change — same value, accessed from a more appropriate place.

## Accuracy Tests

Ran PP consistency tests locally on semianalysis GB300 cluster (4× B200, commit `69713e2`):

| Test | Model | Config | Result |
|---|---|---|---|
| `TestPPAccuracy::test_gsm8k` | Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct | tp=2, pp=2 | ✅ |
| `TestPPAccuracy::test_logprob` | Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct | tp=2, pp=2 | ✅ |
| `TestDPAttentionDP2PP2::test_gsm8k` | Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct | dp=2, pp=2 | ✅ |
| `TestPPMixedChunk::test_gsm8k` | Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct | pp=2, mixed chunk | ✅ |
| `TestFixedBugs::test_chunked_prefill_with_small_bs` | Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct | chunked prefill | ✅ |
| `TestQwenPPAccuracy::test_pp_consistency` | Qwen3-8B | pp=1 → pp=2 | ✅ |
| `TestQwenPPTieWeightsAccuracy::test_pp_consistency` | Qwen3-0.6B (tie weights) | pp=1 → pp=2 | ✅ |
| `TestQwenMoePPAccuracy::test_pp_consistency` | Qwen3-30B-A3B | pp=1 → pp=2 | ✅ |
| `TestGLM4MoE::test_gsm8k` | GLM-4.5-Air-FP8 | tp=2 | ✅ |

## Speed Tests and Profiling

N/A — no hot path changes.

## Checklist

- [x] Format your code according to the [Format code with pre-commit](https://docs.sglang.io/developer_guide/contribution_guide.html#format-code-with-pre-commit).
- [x] Add unit tests according to the [Run and add unit tests](https://docs.sglang.io/developer_guide/contribution_guide.html#run-and-add-unit-tests).
- [ ] Update documentation according to [Write documentations](https://docs.sglang.io/developer_guide/contribution_guide.html#write-documentations).
- [x] Provide accuracy and speed benchmark results.
- [x] Follow the SGLang code style [guidance](https://docs.sglang.io/developer_guide/contribution_guide.html#code-style-guidance).

## Review and Merge Process

1. Ping Merge Oncalls to start the process. See the [PR Merge Process](https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/blob/main/.github/MAINTAINER.md#pull-request-merge-process).
2. Get approvals from [CODEOWNERS](https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/blob/main/.github/CODEOWNERS) and other reviewers.
3. Trigger CI tests with [comments](https://docs.sglang.io/developer_guide/contribution_guide.html#how-to-trigger-ci-tests) or contact authorized users to do so.
   - Common commands include `/tag-and-rerun-ci`, `/tag-run-ci-label`, `/rerun-failed-ci`
4. After green CI and required approvals, ask Merge Oncalls or people with Write permission to merge the PR.

repo.name: sglang
repo.description: SGLang is a high-performance serving framework for large language models and multimodal models.

         attn_tp_size = get_attention_tp_size()
@@ -312,7 +315,7 @@ def forward_prepare(
                 )
             q, k = self.rotary_emb(positions, q, k)
         else:
-            if self.attn.layer_id == forward_batch.token_to_kv_pool.start_layer:
+            if self.attn.layer_id == self.start_layer:
                 self.rotary_emb.get_cos_sin_with_position(positions)
             if self.use_qk_norm:
                 eps = self.q_norm.variance_epsilon

+            self.pp_group.world_size,
+        )
         self.layers, self.start_layer, self.end_layer = make_layers(
             config.num_hidden_layers,
             lambda idx, prefix: Glm4MoeDecoderLayer(
                 layer_id=idx,
+                start_layer=pp_start_layer,
                 config=config,
                 quant_config=quant_config,
                 prefix=prefix,

@@ -27,6 +27,7 @@

         self.total_num_heads = num_heads

-        if self.attn.layer_id == forward_batch.token_to_kv_pool.start_layer:

         # Skip the input_layernorm

         # Input layer concats embeds + target_hidden before qkv (input dim 2x).
         self.is_input_layer = layer_id == 0

@@ -24,6 +24,7 @@
 
 from sglang.srt.distributed import (

 )
